metadata.direction: Word ID → list of Tatoeba sentence IDs from editor-curated examples.

field_notes.sentence_ids: Resolve at https://tatoeba.org/en/sentences/show/<id> for audio, alternative translations, and community discussion.

metadata.source: Derived cross-reference built from data/core/words.json, data/corpus/sentences.json by build/transform/cross_links.py.
